summary: A talking-head employee profile for National Native American Heritage Month: Kelbie, a FEMA National Tribal Affairs Advocate, speaks to camera in a FEMA operations center with subtitles, describing how she would like to be remembered by tribal nations. It is a single-subject interview with a title card and no music.
notable_text: DHS Celebrates National Native American Heritage Month; 'I would like to be remembered as someone who did the most amount of good, for the most amount of tribes, for the most amount of time'
